<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Mime\Encoder; use Symfony\Component\Mime\Exception\AddressEncoderException; /** * @author Christian Schmidt */ interface AddressEncoderInterface { /** * Encodes an email address. * * @throws AddressEncoderException if the email cannot be represented in * the encoding implemented by this class */ public function encodeString(string $address): string; }
